title: Karakum
original_title: Karakum - Ein Abenteuer in der Wüste
overview: Robert, a 13-year-old German boy, sets out to try and find his father, who's in Turkmenistan. On his arrival there he meets up with a local boy  who agrees to help him, but they are abandoned by their adult guides and must fend for themselves.
